name: CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt 4 Dock
shortDescription: The CalDigit TS4 is the gold standard Thunderbolt 4 dock for Mac Mini M4 Pro and AI workstations — 18 ports including 2.5GbE, 98W charging, and support for single 8K or dual 6K displays over a single cable.
useCases: Single-cable docking for Mac Mini M4 Pro workstations
High-speed NVMe external storage via Thunderbolt 4
Charging laptops and tablets at full 98W
Connecting 2.5GbE NAS for fast model weight loading
pros: 18 ports is the most of any Thunderbolt 4 dock — covers every peripheral in one box
98W USB-C charging handles MacBook Pro 14" at full speed
2.5GbE built-in — connects directly to a NAS at 2.5x Gigabit speeds
Single 8K or dual 6K display support via Thunderbolt 4
Solid aluminum chassis with excellent thermal management
cons: At $299, it's the most expensive option in this roundup
Large desktop footprint — not ideal for compact setups
Requires Thunderbolt 4 host — won't deliver full feature set on USB-C only ports
verdict: The CalDigit TS4 is the best Thunderbolt 4 dock for Mac Mini M4 Pro users who want a true single-cable workstation. At 98W charging, 2.5GbE networking, and 18 ports, it replaces every hub and dongle on the desk. The $299 price is high but justified — this dock lasts through multiple Mac generations and handles every peripheral you'll ever connect.

faq.question: Does the CalDigit TS4 work with the Mac Mini M4 Pro?
faq.answer: Yes — the Mac Mini M4 Pro has two Thunderbolt 4 ports and the TS4 connects to either. You get 98W pass-through charging (useful if you power the Mac Mini via USB-C), 2.5GbE networking, and all 18 ports active simultaneously. It's the most capable single-cable dock for the M4 Pro.

faq.question: Can the TS4 run dual monitors from a Mac Mini?
faq.answer: Yes. From the TS4's Thunderbolt 4 downstream port and DisplayPort output, you can drive two 6K displays simultaneously. On Mac Mini M4 Pro which supports up to three external displays, the TS4 handles two of them while the third connects directly to the Mac Mini's HDMI port.

faq.question: Does the CalDigit TS4 work with Windows mini PCs?
faq.answer: Yes, with caveats. Windows mini PCs with Thunderbolt 4 (like GEEKOM AI A7 Max) get full compatibility. Mini PCs with USB4 but not certified TB4 may see reduced display or port performance. Check your mini PC's port spec before purchasing.

faq.question: How does the TS4 compare to the Anker 777 Thunderbolt dock?
faq.answer: TS4 has 18 ports vs 12 on the Anker 777, and 98W vs 90W charging. TS4 also adds 2.5GbE vs Gigabit Ethernet on the Anker. The Anker 777 costs $100 less — if you need fewer ports and standard Ethernet, it's the better value.

notFor: USB-C only hosts — requires Thunderbolt 4 for full functionality
Travel setups — large desktop form factor
entityHeadline: CalDigit TS4 Review: 18 Ports, 98W Charging — Best Thunderbolt Dock for Mac Mini M4 Pro
